payload.answer: The time references are ambiguous: “last Friday” and “next month” depend on the date this was said or recorded. Please choose how to handle it.
repair_options: Add as a separate note preserving the original wording: “Sam said last Friday that he is leaving Goldman next month.”
Clarify the actual date meant by “last Friday” before saving.
Clarify the actual month meant by “next month” before saving.
Save only a tentative/reminder-style note that Sam may be leaving Goldman, without resolving the timing.
Do not save this until the dates are clarified.
